mapper.select: SELECT rr.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, d.dormitory_number, d.building FROM repair_request rr LEFT JOIN student s ON rr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON rr.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE rr.id = #{id}

SELECT rr.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, d.dormitory_number, d.building FROM repair_request rr LEFT JOIN student s ON rr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON rr.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE rr.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC

SELECT rr.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, d.dormitory_number, d.building FROM repair_request rr LEFT JOIN student s ON rr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON rr.dormitory_id = d.id ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC

SELECT rr.*, s.name AS student_name, s.student_id AS student_number, d.dormitory_number, d.building FROM repair_request rr LEFT JOIN student s ON rr.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN dormitory d ON rr.dormitory_id = d.id WHERE rr.status = #{status} ORDER BY rr.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_request (student_id, dormitory_id, description, image) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{dormitoryId}, #{description}, #{image})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM repair_request WHERE status = 0
